basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Technical Officer, Assistant Registrar and More Posts
basic_details.job_type: Direct Recruitment / Deputation (including Short Term Contract)
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) has officially announced the Various Posts Recruitment 2026 with 5 openings. The detailed notification has been published on the official website, nitw.ac.in. Candidates who are up to 56 years of age and hold a Graduate degree, B.E./ B.Tech., M.Sc., MCA, or Master's Degree are eligible to submit their online applications on or before 19-08-2026. Direct links to download the official notification PDF and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Principal Scientific/Technical Officer: Maximum age limit is 56 years. Relaxation: Benchmark Disability: 10 years, Ex-Servicemen: As per Government of India orders, Reserved and departmental candidates: As per rules. Principal Students Activity and Sports (SAS) Officer: Maximum age limit is 56 years. Relaxation: Benchmark Disability: 10 years, Ex-Servicemen: As per Government of India orders, Reserved and departmental candidates: As per rules. Senior Technical Officer: Maximum age limit is 56 years. Relaxation: Benchmark Disability: 10 years, Ex-Servicemen: As per Government of India orders, Reserved and departmental candidates: As per rules. Assistant Registrar: Maximum age limit is 56 years. Relaxation: Benchmark Disability: 10 years, Ex-Servicemen: As per Government of India orders, Reserved and departmental candidates: As per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, B.E./ B.Tech., M.Sc., MCA, Master's Degree
qualification.details: Principal Scientific/Technical Officer: B.E./ B.Tech. or M.Sc./ MCA Degree in relevant field with first class or equivalent grade (6.5 in 10 point scale or 60% marks) and consistently excellent academic record. Relevant fields for PSO (Research): Metallurgical & Materials Engineering / Material Sciences / Chemical Engineering / Chemistry / Physics / Biotechnology. Relevant fields for PTO (Information and Communications Technology): Computer Science / Information Technology. Experience: At least 15 years' experience as Scientific Officer / Technical Officer or an equivalent post or above out of which at least 8 years' experience as Sr. Scientific Officer / Sr. Technical Officer in PB-3 with GP of Rs.7600/- or an equivalent post in Central / State Government Department / Autonomous Bodies / University / Institution of national importance / PSU etc. Principal Students Activity and Sports (SAS) Officer: Master's Degree in Physical Education or Master's Degree in Sports Science with at least 60% marks or its equivalent Grade in the CGPA/ UGC point scale with good academic record from a recognized University/ Institute. Record of having represented the University / College at the inter – University / Inter - collegiate competitions or state and / or national championships. Qualifying in the national – level test conducted for the purpose by the UGC or any other agency approved by the UGC and passed the physical fitness test conducted in accordance with these regulations. Record of organizing such events as student's convener or in later part of life. Experience: Holding analogous post; or With at least 15 years' service in post as SAS Officer or equivalent out of which 3 years should be as Senior SAS Officer in PB-4 with GP of Rs.8700/- or AGP of Rs.9000/-. Senior Technical Officer: B.E./ B.Tech./ M.Sc. in Computer Science / Information Technology or MCA with first class or equivalent grade (6.5 in 10 point scale) and consistently excellent academic record. Experience: Officers from the Central/ State Government or Institutes of national importance or Universities/ University level institution or PSU: (i) holding analogous post; OR (ii) 10 years of experience in the field of Science/ Technology/ Research at the level of Technical Officer or an equivalent post in PB-3, Grade Pay Rs.5400/- or in combination of Rs.5400/- or Rs.6600/-or its equivalent. Assistant Registrar: Master's degree in any discipline with at least 55% marks or its equivalent Grade in the CGPA/ UGC point scale with good academic record from a recognized University/ Institute. Experience: Offices from the Central/ State Governments or Institute of national importance or Universities/ University level Institution or Govt. laboratory or PSU- a) Holding analogous post and b) Possessing Master's degree in any discipline with at least 55% marks or its equivalent Grade in the CGPA/ UGC point scale with good academic record from a recognized University/ Institute.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Principal Students Activity and Sports (SAS) Officer

salary_details.details: Principal Scientific/Technical Officer: Minimum pay of Rs.1,44,200/- in Level 14 of the 7th central pay matrix +DA+allowances Principal Students Activity and Sports (SAS) Officer: Minimum pay of Rs. 1,44,200/- in Level 14 of the 7th central pay matrix + DA + allowances Senior Technical Officer: Minimum pay of Rs.78,800/- in Level 12 of the 7th central pay matrix + DA + allowances Assistant Registrar: Minimum pay of Rs.56,100/- in Level 10 of the 7th central pay matrix + DA + allowances

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Warangal Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Warangal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.post_name: Principal Students Activity and Sports (SAS) Officer

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria

Relevant fields for PSO (Research): Metallurgical & Materials Engineering / Material Sciences / Chemical Engineering / Chemistry / Physics / Biotechnology. Relevant fields for PTO (Information and Communications Technology): Computer Science / Information Technology. Experience: At least 15 years' experience as Scientific Officer / Technical Officer or an equivalent post or above out of which at least 8 years' experience as Sr. Scientific Officer / Sr. Technical Officer in PB-3 with GP of Rs.7600/- or an equivalent post in Central / State Government Department / Autonomous Bodies / University / Institution of national importance / PSU etc. Principal Students Activity and Sports (SAS) Officer: Master's Degree in Physical Education or Master's Degree in Sports Science with at least 60% marks or its equivalent Grade in the CGPA/ UGC point scale with good academic record from a recognized University/ Institute. Experience: Holding analogous post; or With at least 15 years' service in post as SAS Officer or equivalent out of which 3 years should be as Senior SAS Officer in PB-4 with GP of Rs.8700/- or AGP of Rs.9000/-. Experience: Officers from the Central/ State Government or Institutes of national importance or Universities/ University level institution or PSU: (i) holding analogous post; OR (ii) 10 years of experience in the field of Science/ Technology/ Research at the level of Technical Officer or an equivalent post in PB-3, Grade Pay Rs.5400/- or in combination of Rs.5400/- or Rs.6600/-or its equivalent. Assistant Registrar: Master's degree in any discipline with at least 55% marks or its equivalent Grade in the CGPA/ UGC point scale with good academic record from a recognized University/ Institute. Experience: Offices from the Central/ State Governments or Institute of national importance or Universities/ University level Institution or Govt. laboratory or PSU- a) Holding analogous post and b) Possessing Master's degree in any discipline with at least 55% marks or its equivalent Grade in the CGPA/ UGC point scale with good academic record from a recognized University/ Institute.

content_sections.text: Principal Scientific/Technical Officer: Minimum pay of Rs.1,44,200/- in Level 14 of the 7th central pay matrix +DA+allowances Principal Students Activity and Sports (SAS) Officer: Minimum pay of Rs. 1,44,200/- in Level 14 of the 7th central pay matrix + DA + allowances Senior Technical Officer: Minimum pay of Rs.78,800/- in Level 12 of the 7th central pay matrix + DA + allowances Assistant Registrar: Minimum pay of Rs.56,100/- in Level 10 of the 7th central pay matrix + DA + allowances

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Warangal Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Warangal to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NIT Warangal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 19th August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for various posts in the NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026. These include positions like Principal Scientific/Technical Officer, Principal Students Activity and Sports Officer, Senior Technical Officer, and Assistant Registrar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant Registrar post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Assistant Registrar post is a Master's degree in any discipline with at least 55% marks or its equivalent Grade in the CGPA/ UGC point scale with a good academic record from a recognized University/ Institute.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Principal Scientific/Technical Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Principal Scientific/Technical Officer post is 56 years. Age relaxation is provided for candidates belonging to Benchmark Disability, Ex-Servicemen, and Reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for UR/OBC-NCL/EWS candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the UR/OBC-NCL/EWS category is Rs. 1500. SC/ST/PwBD/Women candidates are required to pay Rs. 750.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026 will primarily involve an Interview. An Objective/ Skill Test may also be conducted if deemed necessary by the institute.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates apply for multiple posts?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates can apply for multiple posts, but they must submit a separate application for each post and pay the application fee accordingly. Only one application should be submitted for one post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Senior Technical Officer post?
faq.answer: The Senior Technical Officer post offers a salary in Level 12, with a minimum pay of Rs. 78,800/- in the 7th central pay matrix, plus Dearness Allowance and other allowances.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any experience required for the Principal Students Activity and Sports (SAS) Officer post?
faq.answer: Yes, the Principal Students Activity and Sports (SAS) Officer post requires at least 15 years of service in the post of SAS Officer or equivalent, with 3 years as Senior SAS Officer. Holding an analogous post is also considered.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Official Notification PDF' link provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
